issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill assumes a Python environment with LangGraph, limiting cross-platform compatibility.

scenarios.name: Build 5-agent prediction swarm with confidence-weighted voting
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses LangGraph StateGraph with distinct personas fanning into a confidence-weighted aggregator returning structured JSON; baseline runs identical agents and uses raw majority vote.

scenarios.name: 3-round debate swarm with cross-round visibility and synthesis
scenarios.rationale: Treatment threads previous-round positions into each agent's next prompt and adds a final synthesis LLM call across Bull/Bear/Quant; baseline omits the third agent, cross-round context, and synthesis.
